name: /pr-corpus-learn chains promotion through /promote-standard with class equal to pr-corpus on its provenance
command: mkdir -p pr-corpus && printf '[{"id":"p1","verbatim_quote":"x","usefulness_estimate":4,"supporting_prs":[{"number":1,"org":"a","tier":1},{"number":2,"org":"b","tier":1},{"number":3,"org":"c","tier":1}]}]\n' > pr-corpus/patterns.json && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/pr-corpus-learn.sh" --patterns pr-corpus/patterns.json --dry-run --emit promotion-plan 2>out.txt && grep -q 'chains_to=/promote-standard' out.txt && grep -q 'provenance_class=pr-corpus' out.txt && echo ok 1>&2
